MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Better Property Management is present. Represented by Steve Brown.
Attorney Jeffrey Evans Margulies appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gustovo Rojas is present.
Attorney Jessica Alexandra representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B , for settlement discussions.

***** This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
***** This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.

*** This case did NOT settle. The trial date of NOV-21-2011 remains on calendar.
